title: senecio lagascanus subsp. lusitanicus
intro: Senecio lagascanus subsp. lusitanicus, also known as the Portuguese ragwort, is a plant species within the daisy family, characterized by its bright yellow flowers and narrow leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits associated with Senecio lagascanus subsp. lusitanicus include soothing digestive issues and relieving respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
